subcodes.first_line: O ye wanderers in the path of the All-Glorious Beauty! Though ye are banished and driven far from your cherished homeland, and though ye suffer at the hands of the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آوارگان جمال ابهی هر چند از موطن مالوف دور و مهجور گشتید و معذب در دست اهل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer, @obedience to and respect for government authority
